task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If @react-pdf/renderer is incompatible with Next.js 16/React 19, the PDF component fails to render and the entire feature is blocked.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundational; enables all downstream work; exact file paths and code; only risk is library compatibility.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Client lying about Content-Length could cause server OOM; plan acknowledges this and defers to reverse-proxy.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Could trim 411 chunked and some validation edge cases for faster MVP if scope pressure exists.
task_scores.reasoning: Core API path; validation is thorough; medium compatibility risk; depends on Phase 1.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 — Client Integration and Download Flow
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: html-to-image failing on Recharts in some browsers yields PDFs without chart; worse, unhandled rejection could break the download flow.
task_scores.reasoning: User-facing outcome; clicking Download PDF and getting file; orphaned toPng fix covered; chart fallback planned.

task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Mock bleed (e.g. toPng) could cause flaky tests; try/finally restore addresses this.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: CI_LOW_MEM 413 skip adds conditional logic; could run 413 in separate job instead.
task_scores.reasoning: Required by .cursorrules; high execution quality; reversible; some CI memory complexity.

critical_issues: html-to-image on Recharts is unproven in production — if it consistently fails or throws, the download flow breaks despite fallback; pre-demo validation on target browsers is essential.
basePath deployment: getApiBase relies on NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH at build; jsdom test mutates process.env and does not verify build-time inlining; 404 in production if basePath is misconfigured.
minor_issues: 411 chunked rejection may be dead code — curl/fetch typically add Content-Length; defensive but untestable without raw socket.
Step 1.3 PDF text check assumes UTF-8 plain text; future react-pdf versions could change output format.
sanitizeDownloadFilename in page.tsx returns full filename (e.g. Mike-Chen-warp-report.pdf) but API route also builds filename — minor duplication.
suggestions: Add Pre-Flight curl for basePath to CI or release checklist before any deployment with basePath.
Validate html-to-image on Recharts in target browsers (Chrome, Safari) before Phase 3 completion; document any known-failing setups.
Consider moving 413 test to a separate nightly or staging job with sufficient RAM instead of CI_LOW_MEM skip to avoid untested code paths.
dependency_order: Phase 1 (Steps 1.1–1.3) must complete before Phase 2. Phase 2 (Step 2.1) must complete before Phase 3 (Step 3.3). Phase 3 (Steps 3.1–3.3) must complete before Phase 4 client tests (4.1–4.5). Phase 4 API tests (4.6) depend on Step 2.1 only.
premortem_top_risk: html-to-image fails on Recharts in production browsers, causing either null chartDataUrl (PDF ships without chart) or unhandled rejection that breaks the download flow despite the orphaned-promise fix.
goal_alignment_notes: The four phases together directly serve the stated goal: supervisors and welders can export shareable PDF reports. Phase 3 delivers the visible outcome within the ~18h window; Phases 1–2 are necessary infrastructure; Phase 4 satisfies .cursorrules verification. All tasks are aligned; no scope creep. Visible output within 48h is achievable if execution stays on plan.
